    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-31888 - Shopware has user enumeration via distinct error codes on Store"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-13"
    strings:

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31888 - Shopware has user enumeration via distinct "; content:"CVE-2026-31888"; nocase; sid:8268140; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31887 - Shopware unauthenticated data extraction po"; content:"CVE-2026-31887"; nocase; sid:6574939; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3962 - Jcharis Machine-Learning-Web-Apps Jinja2 Tem"; content:"CVE-2026-3962"; nocase; sid:4340489; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 18 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 8 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
